content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Dreamoon and Stairs". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/476/A
content.inputFormat: The input consists of a single line containing two integers: n and m.
content.outputFormat: Print the minimum number of steps required to reach the top of the stairs.

code.Python3:
n, m = map(int, input().split())
dp = [0] * (n + 1)
for i in range(1, n + 1):
    dp[i] = 1 + (dp[i - m] if i - m >= 0 else (dp[i - 1] if i - 1 >= 0 else 0))
print(dp[n])
